file.content:
class Rooms::InvolvementsController < ApplicationController
  include RoomScoped

  def show
    @involvement = @membership.involvement
  end

  def update
    @membership.update! involvement: params[:involvement]

    broadcast_visibility_changes
    redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
  end

  private
    def broadcast_visibility_changes
      case
      when @room.direct?
        # Do nothing
      when @membership.involved_in_invisible?
        broadcast_remove_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: [ @room, :list ]
      when @membership.involvement_previously_was.inquiry.invisible?
        broadcast_prepend_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: :shared_rooms, partial: "users/sidebars/rooms/shared", locals: { room: @room }
      end
    end
end

---test file---
require "test_helper"

class Rooms::InvolvementsControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "show" do
    get room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    assert_response :success
  end

  test "update involvement sends turbo update when becoming visible and when going invisible" do
    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 1 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "invisible" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "invisible" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end

    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 2 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "invisible", to: "everything" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "everything" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update changing visible states" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update for direct rooms" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_david_and_jason).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "nothing" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason)), params: { involvement: "nothing" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason))
    end
    end
  end

  test "a non-admin can update their room involvement" do
    sign_in :jz

    assert_changes -> { memberships(:jz_designers).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    end
  end
end

content.text: Now I'll implement the fix. The enum assignment raises `ArgumentError` for invalid values before validation runs, so I'll guard with `Membership.involvements.key?` and redirect with a localized alert otherwise.

input.old_string:
def update
    @membership.update! involvement: params[:involvement]

    broadcast_visibility_changes
    redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
  end
input.new_string:
def update
    if Membership.involvements.key?(params[:involvement])
      @membership.update! involvement: params[:involvement]

      broadcast_visibility_changes
      redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
    else
      redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room), alert: t(".invalid_involvement")
    end
  end

class Rooms::InvolvementsController < ApplicationController
  include RoomScoped

  def show
    @involvement = @membership.involvement
  end

  def update
    @membership.update! involvement: params[:involvement]

    broadcast_visibility_changes
    redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
  end

  private
    def broadcast_visibility_changes
      case
      when @room.direct?
        # Do nothing
      when @membership.involved_in_invisible?
        broadcast_remove_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: [ @room, :list ]
      when @membership.involvement_previously_was.inquiry.invisible?
        broadcast_prepend_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: :shared_rooms, partial: "users/sidebars/rooms/shared", locals: { room: @room }
      end
    end
end

class Rooms::InvolvementsController < ApplicationController
  include RoomScoped

  def show
    @involvement = @membership.involvement
  end

  def update
    if Membership.involvements.key?(params[:involvement])
      @membership.update! involvement: params[:involvement]

      broadcast_visibility_changes
      redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
    else
      redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room), alert: t(".invalid_involvement")
    end
  end

  private
    def broadcast_visibility_changes
      case
      when @room.direct?
        # Do nothing
      when @membership.involved_in_invisible?
        broadcast_remove_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: [ @room, :list ]
      when @membership.involvement_previously_was.inquiry.invisible?
        broadcast_prepend_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: :shared_rooms, partial: "users/sidebars/rooms/shared", locals: { room: @room }
      end
    end
end

require "test_helper"

class Rooms::InvolvementsControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "show" do
    get room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    assert_response :success
  end

  test "update involvement sends turbo update when becoming visible and when going invisible" do
    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 1 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "invisible" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "invisible" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end

    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 2 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "invisible", to: "everything" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "everything" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update changing visible states" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update for direct rooms" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_david_and_jason).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "nothing" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason)), params: { involvement: "nothing" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason))
    end
    end
  end

  test "a non-admin can update their room involvement" do
    sign_in :jz

    assert_changes -> { memberships(:jz_designers).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    end
  end
end

require "test_helper"

class Rooms::InvolvementsControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "show" do
    get room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    assert_response :success
  end

  test "update involvement sends turbo update when becoming visible and when going invisible" do
    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 1 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "invisible" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "invisible" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end

    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 2 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "invisible", to: "everything" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "everything" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update changing visible states" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update for direct rooms" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_david_and_jason).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "nothing" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason)), params: { involvement: "nothing" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason))
    end
    end
  end

  test "a non-admin can update their room involvement" do
    sign_in :jz

    assert_changes -> { memberships(:jz_designers).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    end
  end
end

content.text: That single failure is a pre-existing, unrelated environment issue (missing `libjxl` dylib for ffprobe video preview generation), not caused by this change. All other 245 tests pass, including the involvements controller tests.

Changes are left uncommitted in the working tree as instructed.

## Summary

- `app/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller.rb`: `update` now checks `Membership.involvements.key?(params[:involvement])` before updating. Valid values update the membership, broadcast visibility changes, and redirect as before. Invalid values skip the update and redirect with a localized flash alert (previously, an invalid value raised `ArgumentError` from the enum assignment, crashing the request).
- `config/locales/en.yml`: added `en.rooms.involvements.update.invalid_involvement` message, used via `t(".invalid_involvement")`.
- `test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb`: added a regression test asserting an invalid involvement leaves the membership unchanged, redirects to the room involvement page, and sets the expected flash alert.

Verified: `bin/rails test test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb` → 6 runs, 41 assertions, 0 failures/errors. Full suite (`bin/rails test`) → 246 runs, 1 error, unrelated to this change (missing `libjxl` dylib breaks `ffprobe` video-preview generation in `Message::AttachmentTest`, pre-existing environment issue).

## Summary

- `app/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller.rb`: `update` now checks `Membership.involvements.key?(params[:involvement])` before updating. Valid values update the membership, broadcast visibility changes, and redirect as before. Invalid values skip the update and redirect with a localized flash alert (previously, an invalid value raised `ArgumentError` from the enum assignment, crashing the request).
- `config/locales/en.yml`: added `en.rooms.involvements.update.invalid_involvement` message, used via `t(".invalid_involvement")`.
- `test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb`: added a regression test asserting an invalid involvement leaves the membership unchanged, redirects to the room involvement page, and sets the expected flash alert.

Verified: `bin/rails test test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb` → 6 runs, 41 assertions, 0 failures/errors. Full suite (`bin/rails test`) → 246 runs, 1 error, unrelated to this change (missing `libjxl` dylib breaks `ffprobe` video-preview generation in `Message::AttachmentTest`, pre-existing environment issue).
